'''Gaddatha In'Kro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] who served as a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] diplomat during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], In'Kro was one of several diplomatic envoys that were sent by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]] when the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|Banking Clan]] was heavily involved in the war on the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist side]]. He was killed when the Banking Clan manufactured several [[IG-227 Hailfire-class droid tank/Legends|''Hailfire'' droids]] against a large peacekeeping force of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]].
